name: Chicken Parmesan
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 Pounds Chicken breast halves without skin, boned
recipeInstructions:
1. In a shallow bowl, mix the egg with 2 tablespoons water.
2. On a piece of wax paper, combine the bread crumbs and cheese.
3. Coat each chicken breast half with flour, then sprinkle with salt and pepper.
4. Dip the chicken in the egg mixture, then place it in the bread crumb-cheese mixture; set aside.
5. In a skillet, stir together lemon juice and nutmeg with cooked spinach until warm.
6. Melt butter and oil in the skillet over medium-high heat.
7. When the skillet is hot and foaming, add the chicken breasts. Sauté for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until just done.
8. Place the sautéed chicken on a warm platter, top with spinach, and keep warm.
9. Remove most of the fat from the skillet over high heat.
10. Add the heavy cream to the skillet, stirring and scraping the bottom to prevent burning until it boils.
11. Spoon some sauce over the chicken and spinach, then pour the remaining sauce into a serving bowl.
